meaning: vt.装备,配备,训练,准备行装
examples: She got a bank loan to rent and equip a small workshop.
The charity provided money to staff and equip two hospitals.
Owners of restaurants have to equip them to admit disabled people.
Mr. Ghosn recently said Renault wouldn't equip models other than the Fluence with the battery-swapping technology.
If you can equip them with that, they'll be equipped for whatever they face.
